prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合科类最低位次分别为约10342名→9851名→10105名→10760名→12291名，整体呈后移趋势，近3年连续后退，累计后移约2440名；2025年较202 4年大幅后退1531名，下降幅度明显加大，2025年基准位次约12291名；该校在上海市综合科类招生计划2021–2023年均为9人，2024–2025年增至10人；2026年（§ 7）计划仍为10人，与2025年持平。但2026年所有招生专业均要求"物理、化学(2科必选)"，选科门槛较往年提高（此前有物理必选组），可能缩小可报考考生范围，对竞争略有缓 解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年第83名、2026年第84名，近年排名基本稳定，属中上水平理工类高校。
4. 【声誉热度】该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情文件中均未出现，无明显正面或负面事件；抖音热度未进入前106名，短视频平台曝光度一般；投档异常记录中亦未出现，录取走势平稳 ，无断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的电气工程及其自 动化、能源与动力工程高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业热度持续升温，2024年被评为"高热推荐"，能源动力类专业亦获"推荐"评级；计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业持续高热。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年的49276人增加约35%，竞争压力显著增 大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次连续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平但选科门槛提高、上海市 考生数大幅增加约35%导致竞争加剧、电气王牌专业热度持续升温等因素，在2025年基准12291名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约12321名，区间11821–12821名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 通信工程
- 智能科学与技术
- 能源与动力工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 工程造价
- 网络空间安全。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11821–12821名内，建议以二档专业（自动化、通信工程、智能科学与技术、能源与动力工程）为主攻方向，一档专业（电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术 ）作为冲刺，三档专业（测控技术与仪器、工程造价、网络空间安全）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（11821名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive subject category in Shanghai were approximately 10342 → 9851 → 10105 → 10760 → 12291, showing an overall backward trend, with consecutive declines in the past 3 years, accumulating a backward shift of about 2440 places; in 2025, it dropped significantly by 1531 places compared to 2024, with a notably increased decline rate, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12291; the enrollment plan for this university in the comprehensive subject category in Shanghai was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 students in 2024–2025; the plan for 2026 (§ 7) remains 10 students, unchanged from 2025. However, all majors in 2026 require "Physics, Chemistry (2 subjects must be selected)", raising the subject selection threshold compared to previous years (previously there was a physics-required group), which may narrow the pool of eligible applicants, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 83rd in 2025 and 84th in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities.
4. [Reputation and Popularity] The university did not appear in the reputation and public opinion documents from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative events; its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106, indicating general exposure on short video platforms; it also did not appear in abnormal admission records, with a stable admission trend and no signs of gaps or sharp drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both being flagship disciplines of the university, highly corresponding to the majors of Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power Engineering in the enrollment, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Electrical Engineering and Automation major continues to heat up, rated as "highly recommended" in 2024, and the Energy and Power major also received a "recommended" rating; Computer, Electronics/Communication majors remain highly popular. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 but higher subject selection threshold, the significant increase of about 35% in the number of Shanghai exam takers leading to intensified competition, and the sustained popularity of the flagship Electrical Engineering major, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 12291; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12321, with a range of 11821–12821.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Automation
- Communication Engineering
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Engineering Cost
- Cyberspace Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11821–12821, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Communication Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology, Energy and Power Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Engineering Cost, Cyberspace Security) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11821), you can focus on reaching for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation.
